# chalk_offline_store_connection (Resource)

Manages a Chalk offline store connection (Snowflake or BigQuery).

**Required permissions:** `deploy.create`, `deploy.read`



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment_id` (String) The environment ID this connection is scoped to.
- `name` (String) The name of the offline store connection.

### Optional

- `bigquery` (Attributes) BigQuery offline store connection configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--bigquery))
- `snowflake` (Attributes) Snowflake offline store connection configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--snowflake))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the offline store connection.

<a id="nestedatt--bigquery"></a>
### Nested Schema for `bigquery`

Required:

- `dataset_id` (String) BigQuery dataset ID.
- `project_id` (String) BigQuery project ID.


<a id="nestedatt--snowflake"></a>
### Nested Schema for `snowflake`

Required:

- `credentials` (Attributes) Snowflake credentials. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--snowflake--credentials))

<a id="nestedatt--snowflake--credentials"></a>
### Nested Schema for `snowflake.credentials`

Required:

- `account` (String) Snowflake account identifier.
- `database` (String) Snowflake database.
- `role` (String) Snowflake role.
- `schema` (String) Snowflake schema.
- `username` (String) Snowflake username.
- `warehouse` (String) Snowflake warehouse.

Optional:

- `password` (String, Sensitive) Snowflake password. Exactly one of password or private_key must be provided. Stored as sensitive in state. After importing this resource, this field will be null; run terraform apply to restore it.
- `private_key` (String, Sensitive) Snowflake private key. Exactly one of password or private_key must be provided. Stored as sensitive in state. After importing this resource, this field will be null; run terraform apply to restore it.
